title: Amtech - Brick Joint Raker for Home DIY, Durable Aluminium Alloy, Easily Removes Mortar from Brick Joints, Adjustable Nail Depth, Ergonomic Grip, Lightweight and Portable
features: HOME DIY STAPLE: The brick joint raker is an indispensable tool for any masonry project as it efficiently removes old mortar from the joints between bricks or concrete blocks. It’s a must-have for both professionals and home DIYers.

DURABLE: Built with sturdy zinc-plated aluminium alloy, the raker withstands frequent use for a long lasting performance that you can rely on. There’s also an included pin to ensure that you always have what you need for your tasks.

EASY TO USE: Designed with an adjustable nail depth for precise control and accurate removal for clean joints, while the ergonomic handle allows for a comfortable grip for prolonged use. The portable and lightweight tool is easy to carry with you or store in toolkits.
3 YEAR WARRANTY: We work hard to make sure our tools are reliable for any task. That’s why all our hand tools are backed by a three year product replacement warranty.
DIY KNOW HOW: At Amtech, we want to improve every home and life by making DIY a doddle for every generation and skill level with tools and expertise that you can rely on.
description: Product Description Built with sturdy zinc-plated aluminium alloy, the raker withstands lasting use for cleaning out old mortar between bricks or concrete blocks. The raker has been designed with an adjustable nail depth for precise control and accurate removal for clean joints. The ergonomic handle allows for a comfortable hold for prolonged use, while the spare pin ensures that you always have what you need for your tasks. The lightweight tool is easy to carry with you where you need it, and can be stored in toolkits for added convenience.

specifications_table.Included Components: ‎1 x Brick joint raker, 1 x spare pin
